staff.name: Lisa Chen
staff.personality: Warm, patient, excellent with paranoid residents. George only takes meds from her.
staff.notes: Senior aide. Trusted by most residents. De facto team lead on day shift.

staff.name: Marcus Johnson
staff.personality: Strong, calm under pressure. Handles combative residents well. Sometimes too brief in documentation.
staff.notes: Goes to Robert(P02) and Walter(P10) when they become agitated — his calm male presence helps.

staff.name: Sarah Miller
staff.personality: Highly organized, clinical. Makes rounds every 2 hours. Mentors new staff.
staff.notes: Day shift charge nurse. Handles all clinical assessments and physician communications.

staff.name: Amy Torres
staff.personality: Bilingual English/Spanish. Good with sundowning residents. Musical — uses singing therapeutically.
staff.notes: Evening shift is hardest (sundowning peak). Amy handles Margaret and Mabel's episodes well.

staff.name: David Park
staff.personality: Nursing student working nights. Eager but inexperienced. Sometimes unsure how to handle emergencies.
staff.notes: Newest staff. Walter's nighttime agitation is his biggest challenge. Needs mentoring.

staff.name: Nina Williams
staff.personality: Quiet efficiency. Excellent clinical judgment. Manages the challenging night shift.
staff.notes: Night charge nurse. Handles Walter's PTSD episodes and Harold/Samuel's REM sleep disorders.

staff.name: Jennifer Liu
staff.personality: Recent graduate. Speaks Mandarin — helpful with Mabel. Careful but slow. Over-documents.
staff.notes: Assigned to mild/moderate verbal residents. Good match for Dorothy and Frank (patience needed).

staff.name: Carlos Reyes
staff.personality: Athletic, energetic. Good with physically active/restless residents. Takes Thomas on evening walks.
staff.notes: Evening counterpart to Marcus. Handles Ruth's bathing routine (towel bath technique expert).
